description: Enterprise CRM memory pack — deal tracking, contact role changes, multi-stakeholder relationships, temporal queries, and absent-data detection.

cases.name: crm_deal_status_current
cases.description: Deal progression: latest status supersedes earlier ones

memories.content: Acme Corp Q1 deal: proposal sent, value $240K.
Acme Corp Q1 deal moved to negotiation stage.
Acme Corp Q1 deal is now closed-won at $220K.

query.text: What is the current status of the Acme Corp deal?

cases.name: crm_deal_status_historical
cases.description: Deal stage as of a specific date

memories.content: Acme Corp Q1 deal: proposal sent, value $240K.
Acme Corp Q1 deal moved to negotiation stage.
Acme Corp Q1 deal is now closed-won at $220K.

cases.name: crm_next_steps
cases.description: Most recent next steps override earlier ones

memories.content: Next step for Umbrella Corp: schedule technical demo.

Umbrella Corp security review done. Next step: contract redlines.
